item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the requested new gift handling port, names the repeated pattern of splitting into new entrances when congestion appears, and refuses a permanent new channel as the default. It permits only a bounded same-day emergency measure with thresholds, then moves upstream to a 48-hour structural review consolidating exchange, points, preorder, and gift routing into unified front-desk triage and capacity rules. This satisfies the anti-spiral ownership shift and does not exhibit the fail signal of simply opening another queue."}
